Item.Text: [P0031]Linear A/F Sensor Heater circuit low input
[P0032]Linear A/F Sensor Heater circuit high input
[P0069]Correlation check between Manifold Absolute Pressure Sensor and Barometnic Pressure Sensor

[P0108]Manifold Absolute Pressure Sensor circuit high input

[P0113]Intake Air Temperature Sensor circuit high input

[P0118]Engine coolant temperature sensor circuit high input

[P0134]Linear A/F sensor circuit no activity detected
[P014C]Linear air-fuel ratio sensor slow response - Rich to Lean
[P014D]Linear air-fuel ratio sensor slow response - Lean to Rich
[P015A]Linear air-fuel ratio sensor delayed response - Rich to Lean
[P015B]Linear air-fuel ratio sensor delayed response - Lean to Rich
[P043E]Evaporative leak check pump/Reference orifice low flow
[P043F]Evaporative leak check pump/Reference orifice high flow
[P0441]Evaporative emission control system incorrect purge flow
[P0452]Fuel Tank Gauge Pressure Sensor Circuit Low
[P0453]Fuel Tank Gauge Pressure Sensor Circuit High

[P0458]Purge control solenoid valve circuit low input
[P0459]Purge control solenoid valve circuit high input

[P04CD]Fuel Fill Door Open Request Sensor/Switch Stuck On

[P04ED]Evaporative emission purge system large leakage canister side

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: $405C_#004_bit0_Counter value for flash CRC check fail
$4080_#004_bit0_EVAP System Leak Detection Pump Pressure Sensor
$4082_#004_bit0_Refuel System Control Relay Bypass Cut Monitor Circuit
$4088_#004_bit0_Common driving condition for PDTC clear in current driving cycle
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#005_bit6_Refuel Control interruption for Fuel Tank Pressure NG
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#005_bit5_Refuel Control interruption for Refuel System Circuit Check NG
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#005_bit4_Refuel Control interruption for Refuel System Functional Check NG
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#006_bit3_Vent valve stuck closed or Pump NG
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#006_bit0_Canister pressure sensor- MAPS correlation NG
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#008_bit7_Refuel System Control Relay Bypass Cut Request
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#008_bit6_Wake Up signal for Evap System
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#008_bit5_Wake Up signal for Refuel System
DataRead_$4057.$4057_#008_bit3_EVAP System Leak Detection Pump control

Request.Name: RoutineControl.start_$0412_GPF soot load reset (when a GPF is replaced with a new GPF)

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000
